author: mark
text:
cli help: include gates in link subcommand doc strings

Doc review for gates feature — single finding: `bl link` and
`bl link add` help strings listed only the pre-0.3.0 link types.
Updated to include `gates` and a one-liner on what it does. All
other checklist items (README sales pitch, SKILL lifecycle
diagram, error message format, worked example) already landed
with bl-c97d. No AGENTS.md or CHANGELOG in this repo — release
notes are handled by release-plz.
